name: Quickshot
description: A Tediore pistol with Vladof parts that leans heavily into speed, boosting fire rate, magazine size, and recoil control at the cost of accuracy. That makes it a natural fit for aggressive reload-loop play, where you burn through the magazine quickly and let Tediore's thrown reload add a large chunk of your total damage. It is especially comfortable in close-range fights where the reduced accuracy matters less.
notes: It appears at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable loot sources.
